text.title: Google Search Ads Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is keyword research available AND foundation in place AND budget ≥ $500/mo?

branch.question: Is smart bidding (max-conv / target-CPA / target-ROAS) enabled?

conclusion.verdict: ship broad + phrase + exact match-type mix
ship phrase + exact only (defer broad until smart bidding enabled)

text.example: preconds met, target-CPA enabled → broad + phrase + exact match-type mix shipped.
